name: Grilled Chicken Breast with Corn & Tomato Salsa
recipeIngredient: Corn and Tomato Salsa -- recipe follows
recipeInstructions:
In a small saucepan, combine olive oil, pepper, garlic, rosemary, and thyme. Over low heat, bring to a very warm stage (do not boil). Remove from heat and allow to cool.
Brush Dijon mustard over the chicken. Pour the marinade over the chicken, cover, and marinate in the refrigerator overnight.
Remove chicken from the oil and shake off any excess. Place on prepared grill with the skin side down, about 6 inches from the heat. Grill over medium heat for 12 minutes, turning once.
To prepare Corn and Tomato Salsa: In a food processor, coarsely chop 6 Roma tomatoes that have been cored and seeded. Stir in 1-1/4 cups cooked fresh corn kernels, 2 tablespoons chopped jalapeno chili, 1 finely diced small red onion, 2 tablespoons cider vinegar, and 1 tablespoon diced basil. Let stand about 1 hour to blend flavors.
